$comment: Versioned, immutable release URL (git tag v2.9.0); 'main' carries the latest. See GOVERNANCE.md.
title: BONE — Base Object Narrative Export
description: A plugin definition format for attaching AI generation config to SKEL story entities.

bone_id.description: Unique identifier. Lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens.

bone_version.description: Semver version. MAJOR.MINOR required; PATCH optional.

provider.description: Optional provider namespace, such as higgsfield, runway, kling, or flux.

attaches_to.description: Which SKEL entity types this BONE can attach to. character/environment attachment targets studio-registry or embedded asset entities (e.g. a per-character reference sheet).

fields.description: Field definitions describing the expected data shape.

llm_instructions.description: Generator-specific writing guidance for LLM prompt authors.

output.description: Render output format, target, storage template, and write-back behavior.

routing.description: Optional provider routing metadata or lookup hints. Projects may also keep routing in external config.

execution.description: Legacy executable route metadata used by existing BONE definitions.

execution_routes.description: Optional executable routes the agent can choose from, such as MCP, CLI, or skill package routes.

extensions.description: Vendor-specific extension data. Keys should be x- namespaced.

requires.description: Capability ids this BONE needs in order to fire. Hosts join these against their capability matrix to mark the BONE armed / needs-setup / unavailable.

pipeline_stage.description: Optional pipeline stage this BONE participates in (e.g. proposal, scene_plan, generation, review).

authoring_mode.description: Templated (fast, consistent, reusable), Atelier/Bespoke (hand-crafted, higher distinctiveness), or Hybrid (templated base with bespoke passes). Absence = unset.

render_runtime.description: Preferred composition runtime. Governance/selector metadata only — does not execute a render.

decision_log_refs.description: IDs of host decision-log entries that motivated or constrain this BONE.

quality_gates.description: Optional quality gates this BONE must satisfy — governance metadata for host reviewer surfaces.

QualityGate.description: A quality gate a BONE declares it must satisfy, shaped like a reviewer finding (inlined to keep this schema self-contained). Runtime-only fields (id/timestamp) are optional because a BONE declares gates rather than emitting findings.

PromptAssembly.description: Prompt assembly strategy and context injection rules.

template.description: Template string using {{field_name}} and supported system tokens.

max_length.description: Maximum assembled prompt length in characters.

separator.description: Separator used by sequential assembly. Defaults to a single space.
